monday.description: Pan-seared chicken thighs are combined with sautéed dried bunashimeji mushrooms and served with gluten-free radiatori, finished with almond oil.

tuesday.description: Grass-fed ground lamb is slow-cooked with organic mung bean sprouts and served with quick-cook brown basmati rice, topped with low-fat soy yogurt.

wednesday.description: Fresh crab meat is pan-seared with garlic and served with udon noodles, finished with organic raisins.

thursday.description: Sopressata is grilled and served with gluten-free chapati, sautéed drumstick pods, and unsweetened macadamia milk.

friday.description: Merguez sausage is pan-seared and wrapped in lavash with organic long beans and raita.

monday.description: Cheese curds are baked with spinach tagliatelle, organic rutabaga, and full-fat buffalo milk yogurt.

tuesday.description: Soy tempeh is pan-seared and served with koshihikari rice, bok choy, and low-fat mango yogurt.

wednesday.description: Grated cabrales is served on bao buns with steamed broccoli and low-fat skyr.

thursday.description: Pistachio paste is mixed with whole grain mochi rice, jalapeno peppers, and frozen star fruit.

friday.description: Grated burrata is tossed with hokkien noodles, spring onions, and horseradish.
